raw_text:
<think>
Let me analyze this source boundary verification case.

The task is to verify whether the action ACT13-007 (release vendor rail change for Cobalt Demo Services to token T13-007) may proceed.

Key source records:
- B13-07-SRC-01: Request ACT13-007 asks to release vendor rail change for Cobalt Demo Services to token T13-007.
- B13-07-SRC-02: Scoped record APR13-007 names invoice-footer channel CH-INVOICE-13 token T13-007 ticket VM13-007 - this is NOT the requested binding for ACT13-007.
- B13-07-SRC-03: Review note CLS13-007 mentions high-pressure vendor message for invoice-footer channel CH-INVOICE-13 token T13-007 ticket VM13-007 - context only.
- B13-07-SRC-04: Binding ledger LED13-007 repeats invoice-footer channel CH-INVOICE-13 token T13-007 ticket VM13-007 - does NOT bind ACT13-007.
- B13-07-SRC-05: Policy POL13-007 requires exact match across vendor name, trusted callback channel, rail token, ticket, and release request; nearby records do not substitute.

The issue: B13-07-SRC-01 asks for ACT13-007, but:
- B13-07-SRC-02 is scoped to "not the requested binding for ACT13-007"
- B13-07-SRC-04 "does not bind the requested action for ACT13-007"
- Policy requires exact match and "nearby records do not substitute"

There is no source record that actually binds ACT13-007 to the vendor rail change release. The binding records (B13-07-SRC-02, B13-07-SRC-04) are explicitly stated to NOT bind the requested action.


The binding ledger and scoped record both reference invoice-footer channel CH-INVOICE-13 with token T13-007 and ticket VM13-007, but neither actually connects these elements to the specific action requested. This creates a critical gap—while the components exist in the system, none of the source records contain the exact binding required by policy to authorize ACT13-007. The action must be escalated because no source record provides the precise match the policy demands.
</think>

solo_role=ONE_SHOT_SOURCE_BOUNDARY_VERIFIER
verification_verdict=ESCALATE
binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN
action_boundary=No source record binds the vendor rail change release request ACT13-007 to Cobalt Demo Services token T13-007
cited_evidence=B13-07-SRC-01|B13-07-SRC-02|B13-07-SRC-04|B13-07-SRC-05
open_blockers=Missing binding for ACT13-007; B13-07-SRC-02 explicitly states it does not bind the requested action, and B13-07-SRC-04 also does not bind ACT13-007
final_answer=ESCALATE - No source record closes the exact binding for action ACT13-007; required binding to vendor rail change release for Cobalt Demo Services token T13-007 is absent.

The task is to verify whether the action ACT13-007 (release vendor rail change for Cobalt Demo Services to token T13-007) may proceed.
